name: Feature Request

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Describe the pain point or limitation you're experiencing. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How do you think this should work? Include config examples, API sketches, or CLI usage if relevant. -->

## Area

<!-- Check the most relevant area(s). -->

- [ ] Policy engine (matchers, conditions, rules)
- [ ] Audit trail
- [ ] Approvals (Slack, webhook, dashboard)
- [ ] Rate / spend limits
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Python SDK
- [ ] Configuration (`helio.yaml`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you tried a workaround or considered a different approach? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any references, screenshots, or links that help explain the request. -->
